root.sql: select pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(confirm_date , 'MONTH') as confirm_month ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.confirm_year ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.confirm_date ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.seq_no ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.count_mem ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.share_bal ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.dep_saving ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.dep_fixed ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.loan_all ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.profit_accu ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.loan_emer ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.loan_norm ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.loan_spec ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.income ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.expenses ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.profit ,sc_rep_mis_business_volume.reward from sc_rep_mis_business_volume where 1 = 1 /*WHERE*/ order by confirm_date
